positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a celestial owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by intricate constellations and glowing floral elements. The owl has large, expressive, stylized eyes and feather details are rendered in elegant line art. The color palette should be deep midnight blues, shimmering golds, lavender, and hints of teal. The composition is centrally balanced, emphasizing the owl's silhouette against the gradient cosmic background. Style should mimic modern, detailed graphic novel illustration with clean vector aesthetics and a slight vintage engraving influence. High contrast, flat application suitable for apparel printing, minimal gradient areas, crisp edges, centered composition.
